DP.438.0000:
Dr. Footstep: Pokémon are quite easy
for me to read.\f
I need only to see their footprints,
and their innermost thoughts are\r
revealed to me!\f
Oh?
You are skeptical of my claim?\f
Then, let your [0100,0000] walk
in front of me, right here.\f
From its footprints, I will determine
how it feels about you.\f
DP.438.0001:
Dr. Footstep: Do you want to check
the feelings of your Pokémon again?\f
Then, let your [0100,0000] walk
in front of me, right here.\f
From its footprints, I will determine
how it feels about you.\f
DP.438.0002:
Dr. Footstep: ...And that is what
your [0100,0000] thinks of you.
DP.438.0003:
Dr. Footstep: ...Hmmm... [0100,0000]
doesn’t leave any footprints.\f
It’s somewhat difficult for me to
determine what its thoughts are.
DP.438.0004:
Dr. Footstep: ...Hmm... [0100,0000]
happens to be quite the silent type!
DP.438.0005:
Dr. Footstep: ...And that is what
your [0100,0000] thinks of you.\f
I must say, your [0100,0000] and
you share a very close bond.\r
This is for you.\f
DP.438.0006:
Dr. Footstep: ...Hmmm... [0100,0000]
doesn’t leave any footprints.\f
It’s somewhat difficult for me to
determine what its thoughts are.\f
However, your [0100,0000] and
you obviously share a close bond.\r
This is for you.\f
DP.438.0007:
Dr. Footstep: ...Hmm... [0100,0000]
happens to be quite the silent type!\f
However, your [0100,0000] and
you obviously share a close bond.\r
This is for you.\f
DP.438.0010:
Aww... [0103,0001] only plays with
other Pokémon...\f
[0101,0002] feels neglected...\f
Maybe [0103,0001] doesn’t like
[0101,0002] very much?\f
[0101,0002] will try harder for
[0103,0001].\f
Please be nicer to me!\f
DP.438.0011:
Others say there are people who
aren’t very nice to Pokémon.\f
I wonder about [0103,0001]...\f
Will [0103,0001] look after
[0101,0002] nicely?\f
Will I get to go all over with this
Trainer?\f
Can we be... Friends?\f
DP.438.0012:
This adventure with [0103,0001]
is lots of fun.\f
[0101,0002] gets to go places where
I can’t go by myself.\f
I get to battle Pokémon I’ve never
ever seen before.\f
I’m gonna get stronger and stronger
for [0103,0001]!\f
DP.438.0013:
[0101,0002] and [0103,0001] make
a perfectly matched combo!\f
I’ve seen all sorts of people
so far...\f
But [0103,0001] understands
[0101,0002]’s feelings most!\f
I’m a little hungry...
You can tell, right?\f
DP.438.0014:
If I said there can be friendship
between Pokémon and people, will\r
[0100,0000]’s friends understand?\f
But if you see [0103,0001] and
[0101,0002], you will understand.\f
Because [0103,0001] and
[0101,0002] are friends!\f
DP.438.0015:
[0101,0002] is bored...
Play with me more, more...\f
[0101,0002] and [0103,0001],
let’s play nicer...\f
DP.438.0016:
Gonna go with [0103,0001] all over
the place...\f
Be nice to [0101,0002]...
Warm and cuddly...\f
DP.438.0017:
[0101,0002] get strong, make
[0103,0001] happy.\f
Round ones, square ones,
triangle ones, wobbly ones...\f
[0101,0002] wants to see different
kinds of Pokémon...\f
DP.438.0018:
[0101,0002] and [0103,0001]
make a friendly combo.\f
[0103,0001]’s feelings, [0101,0002]
can understand.\f
[0101,0002]’s feelings, [0103,0001]
understands!\f
DP.438.0019:
[0103,0001] makes [0101,0002]
very proud!\f
[0100,0000] boasts to friends
about [0103,0001]!\f
[0103,0001] and [0101,0002] are
best of friends!\f
DP.438.0020:
Why does [0103,0001] use only
other Pokémon?\f
Am I not needed much?\f
Would I have been better off if
I remained in the wild?\f
No, I should give this Trainer
a little more of a chance...\f
DP.438.0021:
Humans can’t understand the cries
of Pokémon, nor our feelings.\f
However, there are some among us
that understand human speech...\f
Hehehe, [0103,0001], you’re not bad
for a human.\f
DP.438.0022:
If a Pokémon were to travel along,
it would be limited as to where\r
it could go.\f
But traveling with a human, a Pokémon
would be able to travel farther afield\r
to more distant cities and lands.\f
Traveling with [0103,0001] has been
rewarding and reassuring.\f
And very entertaining...\f
DP.438.0023:
Some wild Pokémon frown upon others
for traveling with humans.\f
They jeer that the caught Pokémon
have “forgotten the wild.”\f
But that view is mistaken.\f
They have just never met a Trainer
who could be a great partner.\f
A great partner like [0103,0001],
in other words...\f
DP.438.0024:
[0103,0001] is...
A remarkable human and Trainer.\f
That I can always perform the best
any [0100,0000] possibly can...\f
I attribute that entirely to my
partner [0103,0001].\f
When we travel, I can see wild
Pokémon eyeing us enviously...\f
DP.438.0025:
Does [0103,0001] intend to ignore
me forever?\f
Give me more opportunities for me
to shine...\f
DP.438.0026:
If a Pokémon is treated as a friend,
it will return the sentiments.\f
We grow fonder of humans that treat
us with kindness...\f
Does [0103,0001] even like
[0101,0002]?\f
DP.438.0027:
Did [0101,0002] get stronger?
Who is responsible for making me so?\f
Is it [0103,0001]’s doing?
Is the Trainer owed my thanks?\f
DP.438.0028:
[0103,0001] and [0101,0002] are
alike in some ways.\f
In humanspeak, we match up well.
Does [0103,0001] think so, too?\f
DP.438.0029:
[0103,0001] is very impressive,
especially for a human.\f
The Trainer lets [0101,0002] use
every bit of power properly.\f
It is a shame that [0103,0001] is
only a human...\f
DP.438.0030:
That [0103,0001]...
What is that Trainer thinking?\f
Why make me join the team, then call
upon me for nothing?\f
Am I considered useless?
Is the Trainer regretting having me?\f
Does the Trainer dare disrespect
this [0100,0000] so easily?\f
DP.438.0031:
I have little understanding of
[0103,0001] as a human...\f
[0103,0001] may not be too bad,
considering that I, an oft-shunned\r
[0100,0000], am one of the team...\f
That said, I don’t intend to be all
cheerful around [0103,0001]...\f
DP.438.0032:
Our kind prefers to lurk in dark
and dank places...\f
But being with [0103,0001], even
bright and festive places seem less\r
threatening...\f
[0103,0001] has a strange
charisma...\f
DP.438.0033:
Not for a moment did I think I would
be traveling with a human...\f
If my [0100,0000] friends were to
see me now, they would be shocked.\f
Or would they be envious of me...?\f
DP.438.0034:
That [0103,0001] is the most
impressive of humans.\f
It takes a lot to make me,
[0101,0002], sunny and cheerful!\f
As a show of affection, I should
chomp down on the Trainer’s neck...\f
Hahaha... Have no fear...
I was merely joking...\f
DP.438.0035:
Wooooooh...
[0101,0002] has nothing to do...\f
Keep me too bored, and I’m liable
to sneak up and bite...\f
DP.438.0036:
Is there any human that would grow
to like us [0100,0000]?\f
Well? Does [0103,0001] like
[0101,0002]?\f
[0101,0002] doesn’t like...
Well, no, maybe not...\f
DP.438.0037:
[0103,0001] treats me, [0101,0002],
nicely without being scared.\f
But [0101,0002] will be even scarier
from now on.\f
That’s what we [0100,0000] do...\f
DP.438.0038:
[0101,0002] is starting to forget
a little about being in the wild...\f
But [0101,0002] isn’t feeling sad.
It’s never boring with [0103,0001]...\f
DP.438.0039:
There are no Pokémon that dislike
humans...\f
Only humans that dislike Pokémon...\f
We [0100,0000] are especially
shunned...\f
But [0103,0001] always treats me
as a friend and partner...\f
DP.438.0040:
Hnurrrr... Hunh?
This is... Where?\f
[0103,0001]’s house, is this?
It’s not? Hnurrr...\f
If you don’t need me for anything,
can I go back to my Ball?\f
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0041:
Hnurrr... Me? Uhm...
I like to sleep most the time.\r
Oh, I like to eat, too. That’s next.\f
But what I really like is to think.
I’m a very deep thinker.\f
When I think about the future of the
[0100,0000] species...\f
...Hnurrr...hunh?
Oh, I forget where the time goes.\f
Hnurrrr...\f
DP.438.0042:
Hnurrr... Me? Uhm...
There are lots of kinds of moves.\f
I like those Dark-type moves,
oh, and Dragon-type moves, too...\f
How would they be for this
[0100,0000]?\f
Will they be for me?
Or a no, no, no sort of thing?\f
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0043:
Hnurrr... I don’t know how to begin
saying this...\f
I liked living quietly before I met
[0103,0001]. Sssh.\f
But I’m getting to like traveling
with [0103,0001].\f
I think I’m getting sort of funky.
Do you think I’m sort of funky?\f
No? No funk for me?
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0044:
Hnurrr... Me? Uhm...
Other Pokémon, they say to me...\f
“You’re not thinking, are you?”
How insulting they should say so.\f
It isn’t true what they say.
Think, think, think, I do that.\f
All the time, I think hard how to help
[0103,0001]. I concentrate!\f
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0045:
Hnurrr... I did not know that?
I really don’t? What is this?\r
I don’t know what to say?\r
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0046:
Hnurrr... Well, I...
I think I’m motivated.\r
As motivated as the average.\r
But it’s not so simple as that.\r
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0047:
Hnurrr... How should I say this?
We both look out for each other.\r
That’s what we try to do, I think.\r
That is for the best.\r
Hnurrrr...\f
DP.438.0048:
Hnurrr... How do I say?
How should I describe us?\f
We are the sound of both hands
clapping.\f
[0103,0001] and I are together
in synchronicity like twins.\f
Hnurrr...\f
DP.438.0049:
Hnurrr...
What is left to say, I say?\f
We have come so far now, where can
we go but to see this through?\f
Hall of Fame...
Words so sweet fall from my mouth.\f
Hnurrr...\f
